{{Quote|Those who do not learn from history are doomed to repeat it, or so they say.|Dorak|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Dorak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and member of the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council]]. He served as [[Jedi historian|Chronicler of the Jedi]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]], and was one of the many Jedi Masters who trained [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during the future [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] time as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The wisest gardener respects the audacity of a stone.|A proverb by Dorak|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Revan_Jedi_Council.jpg|thumb|250px|Revan defies the council.]]
Dorak joined the Council on Dantooine at some point between [[3964 BBY]] and [[3956 BBY]], replacing [[Bala Nisi]]. Being the Chronicler, he knew much of the [[Jedi Order/Legends#History|history of the Order]]. He trained a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], [[Deesra Luur Jada]], to succeed him as the Chronicler of the Academy, passing all of his knowledge to him. Dorak was also in charge of giving apprentices their first [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] and helping them choose their position in the Order. He would present them with a series of scenario questions and would see what pattern they fell into. He would give them his recommendation, but it was ultimately the apprentice's choice.

During Revan's retraining at the [[Jedi Enclave]] on Dantooine, it was Master Dorak who introduced Revan to the basic tenets of the Order, teaching him fundamental history and discipline. The rest of Revan's training was taken care of by Master [[Zhar Lestin]].

Master Dorak survived [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|Sith bombardment]] and lived to see the end of the war. However, along with two other former members of the Dantooine Council, [[Vandar Tokare]] and [[Zhar Lestin]], he was killed by [[Darth Nihilus]] during the [[Conclave at Katarr|Conclave on Katarr]] in [[3952 BBY]].
